summary: build-brand-snapshot.py defensive read. Tolerates legacy {_value, _proposed, _source, _confidence} wrappers left by pre-v2.6.6 writes.
notes: Safe overlay. Pure read-path change. No data migration — existing wrapped values keep their shape until rewritten through write-to-context (post-v2.6.6 proposed mode only wraps dicts). Snapshot builder now handles both shapes.

changes.note: Added unwrap() and unwrap_list() helpers. Patched audiences/identity/products read sites to unwrap legacy wrappers. Prevents TypeError on proposed-wrapped arrays (e.g. pain_points).

post_steps: python3 .skills/build-brand-snapshot.py {slug} per brand — snapshots regenerate cleanly.
